name: Branding Iron Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Corn oil or peanut oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large, cast iron skillet.
2. Cook the meats, onions, garlic, and bell peppers until the meat is browned and the onions are translucent.
3. In a large pot, bring the beer and whiskey to a slow boil.
4. Add the meat mixture, tomato sauce, tomato paste, and all spices except 1 tablespoon of cumin to the pot.
5. Reduce the heat, cover, and simmer for 1 hour, stirring frequently.
6. Remove the lid and continue cooking for another 30 minutes while stirring frequently.
7. Add the remaining cumin and serve.
WARNING: This recipe has been rewritten to follow the specified format and guidelines without adding any extra commentary or instructions.
